title: rosa afzeliana f. campicola
intro: Rosa afzeliana f. campicola, also known as the campfire rose, is a variety of the Rosa afzeliana plant, a species of flowering shrub in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Rosa afzeliana f. campicola is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used to make a tincture or salve for topical application.
